Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fury]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Fury uses shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Fury is a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Fury is an ancestor of Akura Grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Fury is a member of the Monarch's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Fury caught a massive chunk of stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Fury is associated with a ship and rainbow light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Fury is a member of the Akura team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Fury is Mercy's uncle and older brother.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Fury is the son of Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Fury is a member of the Akura family who delayed their departure to watch the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy mentions Uncle Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Fury possesses a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Fury is scheduled to arrive at the Wandering Titan's location in two days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Fury is a Herald in the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Fury is someone the Seishen King might avoid punishment from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Fury would execute Daji for his actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Fury's objective was to slow Abyssal Palace down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Fury pays in points for destroyed towers and stolen masks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Fury has a nephew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Fury is on the cloudship and suddenly stands up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Fury is located in the fortress and prevents attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Fury is pinned in Sky's Edge by gold dragons and Dreadgod cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Fury is being threatened by enemy Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Fury is someone Malice would sacrifice for her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Fury is tasked with watching over Lindon's team to prevent Herald interference.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Uncle Fury told Mercy and others about a way out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Malice intends to save Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Fury is a character whose eyes Yerin found similar to her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon wanted to be close to Fury to get a battle report.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Fury began to laugh overhead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Fury is ascending to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Fury used the authority of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon instructs Dross to tell Fury something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Fury possesses two different sources of authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Fury received a report about Yerin becoming a half-Herald.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Fury has crimson eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Fury is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Fury is a person who was unable to breathe due to a simple script.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Malice gave up Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The cults in Sacred Valley bear marks from a fight with Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Fury is the son of Malice.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Fury's ascension allows bringing people along.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Fury recommended Wavedancer to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin's eyes are much like Fury's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Fury has torn open a rift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Fury is capable of nodding to a glass marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Fury wears white gauntlets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Fury's eyes glow red when his hair drifts up to a point.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Fury is Pride's half-brother.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury is Mercy's uncle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury's armor blurs into a streak of white when he flies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury has ascended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury uses a white gauntlet to launch downward punches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury wears Abidan armor and can use Wolf Division techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury is Akura Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury is a strong individual who has more experience than anyone in Cradle short of some Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury has shadowy hair that drifts in unseen currents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury is gathering madra to punch through the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury's Presence can transmit his voice to Mercy's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fury is Mercy's uncle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Fury is Akura Pride's half-brother.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
